chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. Criminal Bail Application No. 386 of 2025 Arshad Aziz Abbasi vs. The State For the Applicant: M/s. Jahanzeb Baloch & Muhammad Ahmed Ibrahim, Adv. Along with Arshad Aziz, Applicant Date of hearing: 30.12.2025 Date of announcement: 30.12.2025 1. For Orders on M.A. No. 19122/2025. (U/A) 2. For Orders on M.A. No. 19123/2025 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of Bail Application. O R D E R Muhammad Osman Ali Hadi, J. Urgency granted. Learned counsel undertakes to place on record certified copies, true translations etc. during the course of the week; application disposed of in terms herein. The Applicant seeks protective bail, in respect of F.I.R.No.06/2025, (C.No.Dy.Dir/I&I(IR)/KHI/Supreme-Trad/2025- 26/ registered on 24.12.2025 with Directorate of Intelligence & Investigation (IR), Karachi, pertaining to offence/s under Section/s 21 read with Section 3, 4, 8, 20, 22 and Section XIIA and VIIA of Schedule-I to the Anti-Money Laundering Act, 2010. 2. Learned counsel submits that the applicant has been erroneously nominated in the aforementioned case and is intent upon surrendering to the Trial Court. However, in order to be enabled in such regard, the Applicant seeks to be admitted to protective bail. 3. In view of the foregoing, and without adverting to the merits of the case1, the applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of ten days from the date hereof till end of Court hours on 09.01.2026 or upon surrender of the applicant before the Trial Court, whichever is earlier, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- (Rupees Twenty Five Thousand Only) and a personal recognizance bond, in the like amount, to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. 4.

However, in order to be enabled in such regard, the Applicant seeks to be admitted to protective bail. 3. In view of the foregoing, and without adverting to the merits of the case1, the applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of ten days from the date hereof till end of Court hours on 09.01.2026 or upon surrender of the applicant before the Trial Court, whichever is earlier, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- (Rupees Twenty Five Thousand Only) and a personal recognizance bond, in the like amount, to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. 4. This Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE 1 Mukhtar Awan vs. The State reported as 1990 PCrLJ 617; Sabir Hussain vs. The State reported as 1999 MLD 2208.
